Сайт для физических лиц

Terms of Service

1. About Us

This website is owned and operated by MHV Builders OÜ, an Estonian private limited company registered under registry code 12914774, with registered address at Harju maakond, Tallinn, Kesklinna linnaosa, Narva mnt 7b, 10117, Estonia, VAT number EE102013791, and VAT number PL7831884241 (“MHV”, “we”, “us”, or “our”).
You can contact us at:
Email: info@mhvbuilders.ee
Phone: +372 660 012

2. Scope of These Terms

These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of our website, including its public pages, informational content, visual materials, contact form, and related online functionality (collectively, the “Website”). By accessing or using the Website, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use the Website.

3. Business Use Only

The Website is intended exclusively for business users, including wholesalers, distributors, retailers, resellers, and other professional market participants. The Website is not intended for personal, household, or consumer purchases. Any information regarding our products, services, logistics solutions, or cooperation models is provided solely for business-to-business purposes.

4. Informational Nature of the Website

The Website is a corporate presentation and inquiry platform only. It is intended to provide general information about MHV, its business activities, and potential areas of cooperation, and to allow interested businesses to contact us or request a commercial proposal. The Website is not an online shop and does not enable the placement of binding online orders.

5. No Offer

Unless expressly stated otherwise by MHV in writing, nothing on the Website constitutes a legally binding offer, public offer, acceptance of an offer, or commitment to sell any goods or services. Any request submitted through the Website, including through the contact form, shall be treated solely as a business inquiry. Any supply of goods or services by MHV shall be subject only to separate written commercial documents, quotations, confirmations, invoices, contracts, or other written agreements issued or accepted by MHV.

6. Permitted Use

You may use the Website only for lawful business purposes related to learning about MHV’s
business, products, services, and potential cooperation opportunities. You must not:
a. use the Website in any unlawful, fraudulent, misleading, abusive, or
unauthorized manner;
b. scrape, crawl, harvest, parse, copy, extract, or systematically collect
content, data, or materials from the Website without MHV’s prior written
consent;
c. interfere with the security, integrity, accessibility, or operation of the
Website;
d. upload, transmit, or introduce viruses, malware, malicious code, or any
harmful material;
e. attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Website, its hosting
environment, its server infrastructure, or any connected systems;
f. reverse engineer, decompile, or otherwise attempt to derive the source
code, internal logic, or technical structure of the Website, except to the extent
expressly permitted by mandatory law;
g. use the Website in any manner that infringes MHV’s rights or the rights of
any third party.

7. Contact Form

The Website may contain a contact form through which you may submit inquiries, comments, or cooperation requests.
By submitting a request through the contact form, you confirm that the information you provide is accurate, lawful, and relevant to a genuine business inquiry.
Submission of a request through the Website does not create any contractual relationship between you and MHV and does not obligate MHV to respond, enter into negotiations, or conclude any agreement.

8. Intellectual Property

Unless otherwise stated, all content on the Website, including text, design elements, structure, layout, informational images, graphics, trade names, logos, trademarks, and other materials, is owned by MHV or used by MHV on a lawful basis and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
No right, title, or interest in the Website or its content is transferred to you, except for the limited right to access and use the Website in accordance with these Terms. You may not reproduce, distribute, republish, store, adapt, display, frame, modify, or otherwise use any part of the Website without MHV’s prior written consent, except as expressly permitted by mandatory law.

9. Product and Service Information

We aim to keep the information on the Website accurate and up to date. However, descriptions of goods, product categories, service scope, logistics capabilities, availability, lead times, packaging, technical characteristics, and other commercial or operational details may change from time to time.
Any images shown on the Website are for informational and illustrative purposes only. The actual appearance of goods, including color, shade, texture, packaging, labeling, or presentation, may differ from what is displayed on the Website.
Final specifications, scope, and commercial terms shall be determined only in separate written documentation issued or confirmed by MHV.

10. Third-Party Services and Links

The Website may use or rely on certain third-party services or technical tools, including mapping services, hosting infrastructure, and similar external solutions necessary for the Website’s operation. MHV is not responsible for the availability, security, content, or practices of third-party websites, services, or tools.

11. Privacy and Cookies

Your use of the Website is also subject to our:
a. Privacy Policy; and
b. Cookie Policy.
Those policies explain how we process personal data and use cookies and similar technologies in connection with the Website.

12. Disclaimer

The Website is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis.
To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, MHV makes no warranties, representations, or guarantees, express or implied, regarding:a. uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Website;b. the absence of defects, vulnerabilities, or technical interruptions;c. the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of any information on the Website for any particular purpose.
Any reliance you place on the Website or its content is at your own risk.

13. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, MHV shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, punitive, or similar damages arising out of or in connection with the use of, or inability to use, the Website, including loss of profit, loss of business, loss of opportunity, loss of data, or business interruption.
MHV shall also not be liable for any decision made, or action taken, by you in reliance on information published on the Website without separate written confirmation from MHV.
Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability where such exclusion or limitation is prohibited by mandatory law.

14. Indemnity

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless MHV from and against any claims, losses, liabilities, damages, costs, and expenses arising out of or in connection with:
a. your breach of these Terms;
b. your misuse of the Website;
c. your violation of any applicable law or any third-party rights.

15. Suspension, Restriction, and Termination

MHV may at any time, without prior notice, suspend, restrict, or terminate access to all or any part of the Website where reasonably necessary for technical, operational, legal, security, or compliance reasons.

16. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. The current version will be published on the Website with the updated “Last updated” date.
Your continued use of the Website after any such update constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

17. Language

The English version of these Terms shall be the governing and controlling version. Any translation of these Terms into another language is provided for convenience only. In the event of any inconsistency or conflict, the English version shall prevail.

18. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

These Terms shall be governed by the laws of Estonia, unless mandatory law requires otherwise. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Estonia.

19. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at:
MHV Builders OÜ
Harju maakond, Tallinn, Kesklinna linnaosa, Narva mnt 7b, 10117, Estonia
Email: info@mhvbuilders.ee
Phone: +372 660 012
